content:
type: DEFER
files: Tests/test_image.py
spec: Please own Tests/test_image.py and add tests for backup feature: (1) test_save_backup - create a temp file, save an image to it once to create it, then call img.save(path, backup=True) and assert a file at path+'.bak' exists and its content equals the pre-save original bytes (read original bytes before the second save). (2) test_save_backup_suffix - same but pass backup_suffix='.backup' and assert the backup file is created at path+'.backup' instead of path+'.bak'. (3) test_save_backup_no_existing_file - saving to a brand-new (non-existent) path with backup=True should NOT create any backup file and should not raise. (4) test_save_backup_false_default - saving without backup param (default False) should not create a .bak file. Use tempfile / helper_get_dpi-style temp file helpers already used elsewhere in Tests/test_image.py (see existing save tests for patterns, e.g. tmp_path fixture).
note: backup, backup_suffix params on Image.save()

(2) test_save_backup_suffix - same but pass backup_suffix='.backup' and assert the backup file is created at path+'.backup' instead of path+'.bak'. (3) test_save_backup_no_existing_file - saving to a brand-new (non-existent) path with backup=True should NOT create any backup file and should not raise. (4) test_save_backup_false_default - saving without backup param (default False) should not create a .bak file. Use tempfile / helper_get_dpi-style temp file helpers already used elsewhere in Tests/test_image.py (see existing save tests for patterns, e.g. tmp_path fixture).

content:
type: DONE
files: src/PIL/Image.py
note: Implemented backup/backup_suffix and dry_run in Image.save(). Signature: save(self, fp, format=None, *, dry_run=False, backup=False, backup_suffix='.bak', **params). dry_run runs save_handler against io.BytesIO(), no disk I/O, exceptions propagate. backup copies existing file to filename+backup_suffix via shutil.copy2 before opening for write, only when file already exists (skipped for newly-created files). All existing Tests/test_image.py tests still pass (192 passed). Ready for your test additions.
